name: Chacon Autos
description_short: Buy Here, Pay Here used car dealership offering in-house financing to customers with bad or no credit. Serves DFW and surrounding areas since 1958.
description_long: Chacon Autos is an established Buy Here, Pay Here dealership that has been operating in the Dallas-Fort Worth area since 1958. The company operates multiple locations across Texas, including a presence in Austin, San Antonio, and Dallas, serving customers who struggle to obtain financing through traditional lenders. Rather than referring customers to third-party finance companies, Chacon Autos functions as both the vehicle dealer and the finance provider, allowing them to approve customers with damaged credit, poor credit history, or no credit at all. The company maintains an A+ Better Business Bureau rating and emphasizes transparency and straightforward dealings in its customer testimonials. Their inventory consists of 1-5 year old vehicles including cars, trucks, SUVs, and crossovers, most with remaining factory warranties. The dealership positions itself as an honest alternative to aggressive sales practices at traditional used car lots. Customer reviews consistently mention specific sales staff members (Daniel, George Ramos Jr., Manny, Terry Young, Marcus, Ethan) by name, suggesting a focus on relationship-based sales. The company offers an online application process with bank statement import and ID upload capabilities, claiming to pre-qualify customers before dealership visits. Hours are Monday-Friday 10AM-6PM, Saturday 9AM-5PM, with Sunday closures.
pros: In-house financing eliminates third-party lender rejection for customers with bad or no credit
Established 65+ year track record (since 1958) with A+ BBB rating maintained from beginning
Most inventory vehicles retain factory warranties, reducing post-purchase repair risk
Online pre-qualification process available without requiring dealership visit
Multiple named sales staff highlighted in testimonials, suggesting consistent personnel relationships
All vehicles described as 'inspected and detailed with care' before sale
Specific focus on customers with damaged credit explicitly stated in marketing
cons: Buy Here, Pay Here model typically carries higher interest rates than traditional auto financing, not disclosed on website
Company website provides no APR, finance terms, down payment requirements, or pricing transparency
Limited inventory details on website; requires dealership visit or contact to see specific vehicles and financing offers
Multiple locations mentioned (Austin, DFW, San Antonio, Dallas) but website unclear on consolidation of operations across locations
Website content conflates 'Chacon Autos' and 'Chacon Motors' interchangeably, creating operational clarity concerns
best_for: Individuals with bad credit or no credit history seeking vehicle financing from a single lender
Customers who have been rejected by traditional auto lenders and credit unions
First-time car buyers or those recovering from past credit issues who need direct dealer financing
diagnosis: Chacon Autos is best suited for customers with poor credit history or no established credit who cannot qualify for traditional auto loans and need a single source for both vehicle and financing. Primary caveat: as a Buy Here, Pay Here model, customers should expect significantly higher interest rates and more restrictive terms than traditional auto financing, but this information is not disclosed on the website—customers must call or visit to understand true cost of borrowing.
services: In-house auto financing for customers with bad credit or no credit
Used vehicle sales (1-5 year old cars, trucks, SUVs, crossovers)
Bank statement import for application verification
Vehicle inspection and detailing prior to sale
Factory warranty retention on most inventory vehicles
Multi-location dealership presence across Texas (Austin, Dallas, San Antonio, DFW areas)
Sales consultation with named account representatives
